steps.title: Identify the parallel structure
steps.content:
The passage emphasizes that the collection features multiple stories about romantic relationships, then names the first story. The blank precedes the second story in this list.

The key signal: We're moving from one example to another example of the same type.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
Likewise signals parallel examples—the second story mirrors the first in illustrating Lahiri's treatment of romantic relationships.

The other choices fail to establish this parallelism: granted introduces a concession, for example presumes a general-to-specific relationship that doesn't apply, and hence signals consequence.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
